title: Savoring Summer
excerpt: Around here it is over 80 degrees and sunny, which doesn't feel a bit like fall. Still savoring summer weather in Los Angeles, so I thought I would sneak another colorful layout in. My 15 year old cousin, Brian, was…
body: Around here it is over 80 degrees and sunny, which doesn't feel a bit like fall. Still savoring summer weather in Los Angeles, so I thought I would sneak another colorful layout in. My 15 year old cousin, Brian, was in town and had a great idea to use a protractor to help create a template for these sun rays. I used strips of paper from Ready Set Go and really wanted to feature the “Meet Me In The Sunshine” strip as well as the strip with the plane.
